**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Yunchuan Control Equipment Co., Ltd. is an extremely classic specimen of 'heavy-industrialized business license, actual operation as a zero-person shell.' The forensic engine has completely cleared the underlying massive fake consumer electronics OEM data triggered by Apple Inc. The official commercial system was completely blinded by a series of extremely intimidating heavy-industry words in its license, such as 'CNC equipment manufacturing,' 'electromechanical equipment manufacturing,' and even 'auto parts manufacturing,' mechanically assigning it to 'Electrical Machinery and Equipment Manufacturing.' However, the physical probe directly revealed its old and hollowed-out baseline: this twenty-year-old company established in 2005 has a paid-in capital of a mere 450,000 RMB, and most fatally, its 2024 insured headcount is an absolute '0 people.' Its registered address is 'No. 58 Fengyousi, Qinhuai District, Nanjing City.' Fengyousi is a highly typical historical block and old residential area in Nanjing's old city south, surrounded mostly by temple ruins and old civilian dwellings. In such old city alleys, relying on 0 employees to 'manufacture CNC equipment and auto parts'? This is pure industrial science fiction. Re-examining its extremely split business license: the first half is a heavy-industry family bucket, while the second half suddenly turns into 'sales of office supplies, daily necessities, and flowers.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not a heavy machinery or electrical manufacturing plant; it is a pure Zero-Employee Universal Trading & Proxy Shell hidden in the civilian dwellings of the old city south. The owner (Li Fuhong) uses this old shell with the word 'manufacturing' purely to act as a 'middleman,' even capable of issuing invoices and routing payments for flowers and office supplies.
